nodes.title: LoRAs
widgets_values:
## LoRA links

**LoRA-darkbrush**: [darkbrush.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/krea/Krea-2-LoRA-darkbrush/resolve/main/darkbrush.safetensors)

*Trigger word: monochrome ink wash style*

**LoRA-kidsdrawing**: [kidsdrawing.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/krea/Krea-2-LoRA-kidsdrawing/resolve/main/kidsdrawing.safetensors?download=true)

*Trigger word: naive expressive sketch style*

**LoRA-vintagetarot**: [vintagetarot.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/krea/Krea-2-LoRA-vintagetarot/resolve/main/vintagetarot.safetensors?download=true)

*Trigger word: vintage tarot style*

**LoRA-dotmatrix**: [dotmatrix.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/krea/Krea-2-LoRA-dotmatrix/resolve/main/dotmatrix.safetensors?download=true)

*Trigger word: Monochrome stippling style*

**LoRA-retroanime**: [retroanime.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/krea/Krea-2-LoRA-retroanime/resolve/main/retroanime.safetensors?download=true)

*Trigger word: Purple retro anime style*

**LoRA-rainywindow**: [rainywindow.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/krea/Krea-2-LoRA-rainywindow/resolve/main/rainywindow.safetensors?download=true)

*Trigger word: rainy window style*

**LoRA-softwatercolor**: [softwatercolor.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/krea/Krea-2-LoRA-softwatercolor/resolve/main/softwatercolor.safetensors?download=true)

*Trigger word: Art Deco watercolor style*

**LoRA-neondrip**: [neondrip.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/krea/Krea-2-LoRA-neondrip/resolve/main/neondrip.safetensors?download=true)

*Trigger word: Textured abstract style*

nodes.title: Model links
widgets_values:
## links

**diffusion_models**

- **FP8**: [krea-2-turbo-fp8.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/vantagewithai/Krea-2/resolve/main/krea-2-turbo-fp8.safetensors?download=true)
- **BF16**: [krea-2-turbo-bf16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/vantagewithai/Krea-2/resolve/main/krea-2-turbo-bf16.safetensors?download=true)

**GGUF**

- [krea2_turbo-XX_X.gguf](https://huggingface.co/vantagewithai/Krea-2-Turbo-GGUF/tree/main)


**text_encoders**

- [qwen3vl_4b_fp8_scaled.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen3-VL/resolve/main/text_encoders/qwen3vl_4b_fp8_scaled.safetensors?download=true)

**vae**

- [qwen_image_vae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/resolve/main/split_files/vae/qwen_image_vae.safetensors)

**Required Custom Node**

- [Vantage-Nodes](https://github.com/vantagewithai/Vantage-Nodes)

**Location*

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │      └── qwen3vl_4b_fp8_scaled.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 unet/
│   │      └── krea2_turbo-XX_X.gguf
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │      └── krea-2-turbo-fp8.safetensors
│   └── 📂 vae/
│          └── qwen_image_vae.safetensors
```

nodes.title: Compositor System Prompt
widgets_values: Use the reference image only for style transfer. Ignore its scene, subject, objects, and narrative entirely. Extract only visual style signals such as palette, texture, lighting, contrast, rendering medium, and aesthetic tone. Apply those style signals to the user’s target image or prompt while preserving the target content exactly:
adjust colors and make it realistic scene

Describe the key features of the reference image (color, shape, size, texture, objects, background), then explain how the user's instruction should combine with or alter it, and generate a new image meeting the instruction while staying consistent with the reference where appropriate:
Use the reference image only for style transfer. Ignore its scene, subject, objects, and narrative entirely. Extract only visual style signals such as palette, texture, lighting, contrast, rendering medium, and aesthetic tone. Apply those style signals to the user’s target image or prompt while preserving the target content exactly.

extra.workflow_notes: Native ComfyUI 0.25.0+ Krea2 workflow. Uses official CLIPLoader/UNETLoader nodes. Requires 3 model files (see Note node).
